title: salix × maritima
intro: Salix × maritima, also known as grey willow or Salix × fragilis, is a hybrid willow plant that is native to the coastal regions of Europe and Asia. The bark of this plant contains salicin, a compound with anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties, making it useful for medicinal purposes. The health benefits of Salix × maritima include reducing fever, alleviating headaches and arthritis symptoms, and acting as a natural antiseptic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin irritations.
